# Derek Yuan — Developer Portfolio

> Personal portfolio and CV of Derek Yuan: developer, chess engineer, and AI builder.

Derek Yuan is a software developer with expertise in Python, TypeScript, React, Android (Kotlin), Unity (C#), and AI/ML. This site showcases his projects, certifications, and professional background.

## Projects

- [Election Tracker](https://electiontracker.derekyuan.co.uk/): UK election projection and results tracker built with real-time data.
- Chess Toolkit: Chess analysis and tooling utilities.
- DragonBot: Discord bot project.
- QuickNotzz: Note-taking application.
- PixelMaster: Pixel art creation tool.

## Certifications

Derek holds 20+ certifications spanning Python, JavaScript, C#, Unity game development, data science, machine learning, ethical hacking, DevOps, Django, Android development, and Microsoft Office Specialist (Excel Expert, Word Expert, PowerPoint Associate, MOS Associate).

## Contact

- Email: derekyuan1000@gmail.com
- Twitter/X: @derekyuan1000
